title: papaver armeniacum var. fugax
intro: Papaver armeniacum var. fugax, also known as Armenian poppy or Fugax poppy, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Papaver armeniacum var. fugax include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
